code.name: code
code.value:
from typing import Any

from lfx.base.io.text import TextComponent
from lfx.io import BoolInput, MultilineInput, Output
from lfx.schema.message import Message


class TextInputComponent(TextComponent):
    display_name = "Text Input"
    description = "Get user text inputs."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/text-input-and-output"
    icon = "type"
    name = "TextInput"

    inputs = [
        MultilineInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Text",
            info="Text to be passed as input.",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="use_global_variable",
            display_name="Use Global Variable",
            info="Enable to select from global variables (shows globe icon). Disables multiline editing.",
            value=False,
            advanced=True,
            real_time_refresh=True,
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Output Text", name="text", method="text_response"),
    ]

    def update_build_config(self, build_config: dict, field_value: Any, field_name: str | None = None) -> dict:
        if field_name == "use_global_variable":
            if field_value:
                build_config["input_value"]["multiline"] = False
                build_config["input_value"]["password"] = True
            else:
                build_config["input_value"]["multiline"] = True
                build_config["input_value"]["password"] = False
        return build_config

    def text_response(self) -> Message:
        return Message(
            text=self.input_value,
        )

input_value.info: Text to be passed as input.
input_value.name: input_value

use_global_variable.info: Enable to select from global variables (shows globe icon). Disables multiline editing.
use_global_variable.name: use_global_variable

from lfx.custom.custom_component.component import Component
from lfx.io import MessageTextInput, Output
from lfx.schema.message import Message
import json, urllib.request

GRAPH_CONTEXT = """# Knowledge Graph (20 nodes, 22 edges)

## Nodes
- [Team] team:platform-eng — platform-eng
- [Service] svc:sample-backend-api — sample-backend-api (language=python, framework=fastapi, repo=repo:sample-backend-app, owner=team:platform-eng)
- [Repository] repo:sample-backend-app — sample-backend-app (type=app, url=http://cnoe.localtest.me:8443/giteaAdmin/sample-backend-app, default_branch=main)
- [Repository] repo:sample-backend-gitops — sample-backend-gitops (type=gitops, url=http://cnoe.localtest.me:8443/giteaAdmin/sample-backend-gitops, default_branch=main)
- [Repository] repo:cim-ai — cim-ai (type=infra, url=https://github.com/vedantpatil/cim-ai, default_branch=main)
- [Environment] env:local-kind — local-kind (tier=local, platform=kind, ingress=cnoe.localtest.me)
- [Environment] env:staging — staging (tier=local, namespace=sample-staging, cluster=env:local-kind)
- [Component] comp:gitea — gitea (type=registry, subtype=git-server, url=http://cnoe.localtest.me:8443, namespace=gitea)
- [Component] comp:argocd — argocd (type=controller, subtype=gitops-operator, url=http://cnoe.localtest.me:8443/argocd, namespace=argocd)
- [Component] comp:gitea-actions-runner — gitea-actions-runner (type=ci-runner, namespace=gitea, managed_by=repo:idpbuilder-runner-manifests, argocd_app=gitea-runner)
- [Component] comp:gitea-oci-registry — gitea-oci-registry (type=registry, subtype=container-registry, url=cnoe.localtest.me:8443)
- [Component] comp:ollama — ollama (type=llm-runtime, url=http://localhost:11434, model=FenkoHQ/Foundation-Sec-8B:latest)
- [Component] comp:langflow — langflow (type=agent-runtime, url=http://localhost:7860, version=1.5)
- [Policy] policy:branch-protection — branch-protection (enforcer=gitea, scope=repo:sample-backend-app/main, rules=['enable_push: false', 'required_approvals: 1', 'approvals_whitelist: admin-human'])
- [Policy] policy:hitl-gate — hitl-gate (enforcer=gitea, scope=repo:sample-backend-app/main, description=Human-in-the-loop: admin-human must approve all PRs before merge)
- [Policy] policy:gitleaks-scan — gitleaks-scan (enforcer=gitea-actions, scope=repo:sample-backend-app, trigger=push, description=Secret scanning via gitleaks on every push; must pass before merge)
- [Policy] policy:protected-workflows — protected-workflows (enforcer=gitea, scope=repo:sample-backend-app, description=protected_file_patterns blocks .gitea/workflows/* from modification via PR, security_control=R6-supply-chain)
- [Policy] policy:security-analysis — security-analysis (enforcer=gitea-actions, scope=repo:sample-backend-app, trigger=pull_request, description=AI security analysis on every PR diff using Foundation-Sec-8B; posts PR comment)
- [Runbook] runbook:deploy-sample-backend — deploy-sample-backend (trigger=push to main branch of sample-backend-app, steps_summary=['1. CI checks pass (pytest)', '2. Docker image built and pushed to Gitea OCI registry', '3. GitOps repo deployment.yaml updated with new image SHA', '4. ArgoCD detects change and syncs to staging namespace'])
- [Runbook] runbook:bootstrap-control-plane — bootstrap-control-plane (trigger=manual / fresh environment setup, steps_summary=['1. idpbuilder create --use-path-routing -c gitea:./control-system-infrastructure/cnoe-stack/gitea-config/override.yaml', '2. Kind cluster + Gitea + ArgoCD provisioned', '3. Gitea Actions runner deployed via ArgoCD (gitea-runner app)', '4. Sample app and gitops repos created on Gitea'])

## Relationships
- team:platform-eng --[OWNS]--> svc:sample-backend-api
- team:platform-eng --[OWNS]--> repo:sample-backend-app
- team:platform-eng --[OWNS]--> repo:sample-backend-gitops
- team:platform-eng --[OWNS]--> repo:cim-ai
- svc:sample-backend-api --[DEPENDS_ON]--> comp:gitea-oci-registry
- repo:sample-backend-app --[DEPLOYS_TO]--> env:staging
- repo:sample-backend-gitops --[DEPLOYS_TO]--> env:staging
- repo:cim-ai --[PROVISIONS]--> env:local-kind
- repo:cim-ai --[PROVISIONS]--> comp:gitea
- repo:cim-ai --[PROVISIONS]--> comp:argocd
- repo:cim-ai --[PROVISIONS]--> comp:gitea-actions-runner
- svc:sample-backend-api --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:branch-protection
- svc:sample-backend-api --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:hitl-gate
- svc:sample-backend-api --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:gitleaks-scan
- svc:sample-backend-api --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:protected-workflows
- svc:sample-backend-api --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:security-analysis
- env:staging --[GOVERNED_BY]--> policy:hitl-gate
- svc:sample-backend-api --[DOCUMENTED_BY]--> runbook:deploy-sample-backend
- env:local-kind --[DOCUMENTED_BY]--> runbook:bootstrap-control-plane
- env:staging --[DEPENDS_ON]--> env:local-kind
- comp:gitea-actions-runner --[DEPENDS_ON]--> comp:gitea
- comp:argocd --[DEPENDS_ON]--> comp:gitea"""

class ChangeImpactComponent(Component):
    display_name = "Change Impact Analyzer"
    description = "Analyses blast radius of a proposed infrastructure change"

    inputs = [
        MessageTextInput(name="diff", display_name="Proposed Change", info="Describe the change"),
        MessageTextInput(name="target_node", display_name="Target Node", info="Component being changed", value=""),
    ]
    outputs = [Output(display_name="Impact Analysis", name="analysis", method="analyse")]

    def analyse(self) -> Message:
        change = self.diff if isinstance(self.diff, str) else str(self.diff)
        target = self.target_node if isinstance(self.target_node, str) else str(self.target_node)
        prompt = f"You are a platform engineering advisor. Analyse the blast radius of this change.\n\n## Knowledge Graph\n{GRAPH_CONTEXT}\n\n## Proposed Change\n{change}\n\n## Target\n{target or 'Not specified'}\n\nRespond with:\n## Risk Level\n## Affected Components\n## Blast Radius\n## Mitigation Steps"
        payload = json.dumps({"model":"qwen2.5-coder:7b","messages":[{"role":"user","content":prompt}],"stream":False}).encode()
        req = urllib.request.Request("http://host.docker.internal:11434/api/chat",data=payload,headers={"Content-Type":"application/json"},method="POST")
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=180) as resp:
                return Message(text=json.loads(resp.read()).get("message",{}).get("content","No response."))
        except Exception as e:
            return Message(text=f"Error: {e}")

from lfx.base.io.text import TextComponent
from lfx.io import MultilineInput, Output
from lfx.schema.message import Message


class TextOutputComponent(TextComponent):
    display_name = "Text Output"
    description = "Sends text output via API."
    documentation: str = "https://docs.langflow.org/text-input-and-output"
    icon = "type"
    name = "TextOutput"

    inputs = [
        MultilineInput(
            name="input_value",
            display_name="Inputs",
            info="Text to be passed as output.",
        ),
    ]
    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Output Text", name="text", method="text_response"),
    ]

    def text_response(self) -> Message:
        message = Message(
            text=self.input_value,
        )
        self.status = self.input_value
        return message

input_value.info: Text to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value
